title: E-Kalyan Scholarship 2026
content: Students belonging to SC/ST/OBC categories can apply for the E-Kalyan scholarship through the official portal ekalyan.cgg.gov.in. The last date for application is March 31, 2026. Required documents include Aadhaar card, income certificate, caste certificate, and previous marksheet. The scholarship covers tuition fees and provides a monthly stipend of Rs 1000 for hostelers.

title: Admission Process 2026-27
content: Admission to Government Polytechnic Adityapur for the session 2026-27 will be conducted through PECE (Polytechnic Entrance Competitive Examination) conducted by SBTE Jharkhand. Eligible candidates must have passed 10th (Matric) with minimum 35% marks. Four diploma programs are offered: Computer Science Engineering (CSE), Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, and Metallurgical Engineering. Each branch has 45 seats. Counseling will be held at the institute in July 2026. Lateral entry to 2nd year is available for ITI holders.

title: Placement Drive Notice - Tata Steel
content: Tata Steel will conduct a campus recruitment drive at Government Polytechnic Adityapur on 15th April 2026. Eligible branches: Mechanical Engineering and Metallurgical Engineering. Minimum CGPA requirement: 6.5. The selection process includes: Written Test, Group Discussion, and Personal Interview. Package offered: 4.2 LPA to 5.5 LPA. Interested students must register with the Training & Placement Cell by 10th April 2026. Contact Dr. R.K. Singh, T&P Officer for registration.

title: Exam Schedule - Even Semester 2026
content: The even semester examinations for all branches (2nd, 4th, and 6th semester) will commence from 20th May 2026. Admit cards will be available from 10th May 2026 on the SBTE Jharkhand portal. Students with attendance below 75% will not be eligible to appear for examinations. Practical examinations will be conducted from 12th to 18th May 2026. Students must carry their college ID card and admit card to the examination hall.

title: Faculty Information
content: Government Polytechnic Adityapur has 11 dedicated faculty members across 4 departments. CSE Department: Prof. Amit Kumar (HOD), Prof. Sunita Devi, Prof. Rajesh Verma. Mechanical Department: Prof. B.K. Sharma (HOD), Prof. Manoj Tiwari, Prof. Deepak Kumar. Electrical Department: Prof. S.K. Sinha (HOD), Prof. Priya Kumari. Metallurgical Department: Prof. R.N. Prasad (HOD), Prof. Ashok Singh. Principal: Sri K.K. Pandey. All faculty members hold M.Tech or equivalent qualifications with minimum 10 years of teaching experience.
